title: Inputs and outputs of inverses
text: The inverse function reverses the input and output quantities

title: Reversing the Inputs with Outputs
text: Use the given pairs to write points for the inverse. If $$f(2)=4$$, what is $$4f^{\left(-1\right)}$$? If $$f(5)=12$$, hat is $$12f^{\left(-1\right)}$$?
